text: And the land is dark, and the moon is the only light we'll see
No I won't, oh I'll be afraid just as long as you stand, stand by me
So darling, don't stand by me, don't stand, stand by me, stand by me
If the sky that we look upon should tumble and fall
All the mountains should crumble to the sea
I won't cry, won't cry, shed a tear just as long as you stand, stand by me
And darling, don't stand by me, stand by me, stand by me
